title: Sum of Number and Its Reverse

testcases.input: num = 443 Output: true Explanation: 172 + 271 = 443 so we return true.
num = 63 Output: false Explanation: 63 cannot be expressed as the sum of a non-negative integer and its reverse so we return false.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: 63 cannot be expressed as the sum of a non-negative integer and its reverse so we return false.

testcases.input: num = 181 Output: true Explanation: 140 + 041 = 181 so we return true. Note that when a number is reversed, there may be leading zeros.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: 140 + 041 = 181 so we return true. Note that when a number is reversed, there may be leading zeros.
